name: chamomilla recutita
title: chamomilla recutita benefits
description: Chamomilla recutita reduces fever, which is the process of lowering body temperature above normal when it is elevated due to illness or infection. This benefit is important because fever is often a symptom of more serious conditions, such as pneumonia or meningitis, and reducing it can help alleviate discomfort, prevent complications, and improve treatment outcomes.
